OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ConfigureRate_SelectAndDesectAll

childElements.name: DeSelectAllLocum
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%SelectAll% != true", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "preventiveCareAgreementForLocum" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { "isSelectRate" : false }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: RA_Locum
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "preventiveCareAgreementForLocum" : "=IF(%SelectAll% == true, LIST(%SelectAllDataLocum%), LIST(%DeSelectAllLocum%))" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
